mapper.select: select a.id id, a.person_id personId, b.name name, c.name department, b.jobs position, a.sign_time signTime, a.sign_status signStatus, a.enroll_status enrollStatus from xm_project_terminal_train_sign a left join xm_person b on a.person_id = b.id left join sys_org c on b.org_id = c.id where a.is_delete = 0 and b.is_delete = 0 and a.train_id = #{id} and a.enroll_status = 1

select count(1) from xm_project_terminal_train_sign a where a.train_id = #{id} and a.enroll_status = 1 and a.is_delete = 0
and a.sign_status != 3
and a.sign_status = 3

SELECT train.id, train.train_name, sign.person_id, sign.enroll_time, sign.enroll_status, train.train_sdate, train.train_edate, sign.sign_time, sign.sign_status FROM xm_project_terminal_train_sign sign INNER JOIN xm_project_terminal_train train ON sign.train_id = train.id WHERE sign.is_delete = 0 AND person_id = #{personId}
